AWS Databricks Platform Map

Framework-aligned view of deployed capabilities, modules, and maturity

Full RoadmapOverview📊 Deployment Status🔧 Implementation✅ PrerequisitesAWS FrameworkDatabricks FrameworkModulesMaturity

🔧 Implementation Progress

Tasks Completed20 / 3067%
Gaps Addressed11 / 2642%
Critical Items54 done
Files Modified43unique files
SEC-001

Git PAT Removal from Terraform State

CriticalCompleted

Remove GitHub Personal Access Token from Terraform state file to prevent credential exposure in production data platform pipeline

Category: Security
Impact: PAT never persisted in .tfstate; flows from GitHub Secrets → Actions → Terraform → Databricks only. Foundation for secure production data platform deployment.
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • git_integration/main.tf
  • git_integration/variables.tf
Related Gap: Credential Management
SEC-002

S3 Bucket Security Hardening

HighCompleted

Implement versioning, bucket policy, lifecycle management, and KMS key policies for all S3 buckets to protect production data platform assets

Category: Security
Impact: Enterprise-grade bucket security: versioning enabled for data recovery, HTTPS enforced, Glacier lifecycle (90d) for cost optimization, KMS rotation enabled. Foundation for trustworthy data platform storage.
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
  • storage/variables.tf
Related Gap: Data Protection
SEC-003

Secret Scanning Pre-Commit Hook

HighCompleted

Automated detection and blocking of hardcoded secrets before commits

Category: Security
Impact: Prevents accidental secret commits (AWS keys, GitHub PATs, passwords); provides guidance for GitHub Secrets
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • aws_dbx/.git-hooks/pre-commit
  • scripts/install-pre-commit-hook.sh
Related Gap: Secret Management
SEC-004

S3 Bucket Policy with Databricks Roles

HighCompleted

Configure bucket policies with least-privilege Databricks role access including required actions

Category: Security
Impact: Added s3:PutWithBucketOwnerFullControl, s3:DeleteObject, s3:PutObjectWithTagging for workspace validation
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Access Control
SEC-005

Terraform Backend State Encryption

MediumCompleted

Verify S3 backend encryption and state security configuration

Category: Security
Impact: Confirmed encrypt=true sufficient for Terraform 1.6+; DynamoDB locking optional
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • databricks_deployment/backend.tf
Related Gap: State Management
OPS-001

Audit Log Delivery Deduplication

CriticalCompleted

Prevent per-environment recreation of account-level audit log delivery resources

Category: Operations
Impact: Single audit bucket shared across all workspaces; count-conditional prevents drift
Completed: 2026-03-05

  • databricks_deployment/main.tf
  • databricks_deployment/variables.tf
  • databricks_deployment/outputs.tf

Module Output List Access Fix

HighCompleted

Fix outputs accessing count-conditional modules with proper list indexing

Category: Operations
Impact: Outputs handle module[0] list access with null checks when count=0

CloudWatch Log Group Idempotency

MediumCompleted

Handle existing CloudWatch log groups without errors on re-run

Category: Operations
Impact: Added lifecycle.ignore_changes to prevent ResourceAlreadyExistsException
Completed: 2026-03-05

Provider Type Mismatch Resolution

CriticalCompleted

Resolve hashicorp/databricks vs databricks/databricks provider conflicts

Category: Infrastructure
Impact: Cleared cached old provider; re-initialized with correct databricks/databricks provider
Completed: 2026-03-05

  • All terraform.lock.hcl files

Duplicate Variable Removal

MediumCompleted

Remove duplicate region variable declaration in storage module

S3 Versioning Conflict Resolution

HighCompleted

Remove conflicting versioning configuration from workspace creation module

Category: Infrastructure
Impact: Storage module manages versioning (Enabled); workspace module applies bucket policy only

Lifecycle Filter Requirement

MediumCompleted

Add required filter block to S3 lifecycle configuration rules

Category: Infrastructure
Impact: Added empty filter {} to apply transition policy to all objects
Completed: 2026-03-05

INF-005

IAM Permission Handling

HighCompleted

Skip lifecycle/KMS resources when GitHub Actions role lacks permissions

Category: Infrastructure
Impact: Conditional count prevents creation when role ARNs empty; allows deployment without extra permissions
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Permission Management
COST-001

S3 Lifecycle Tiering Strategy

MediumCompleted

Implement Glacier transition and deletion policies for cost savings

Category: Cost Optimization
Impact: Standard (0-90d) → Glacier (90-365d) → Delete (365d+); estimated 70% storage cost reduction
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Cost Control
COMP-001

S3 Versioning for Audit Trail

HighCompleted

Enable versioning on all S3 buckets for data recovery and compliance

Category: Compliance
Impact: Object history tracked; supports data recovery and forensic analysis
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Audit Requirements
COMP-002

KMS Key Annual Rotation

HighCompleted

Enable automatic annual KMS key rotation for all encryption keys

Category: Compliance
Impact: Automatic key material rotation every 365 days; previous keys retained for decryption
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Encryption Management
ARCH-001

SSO/SCIM Account Validation Operating Model Finalized

HighCompleted

Account-level SCIM is enabled. Due to account-console/API limitations, the team has formally adopted documented manual SSO/SCIM validation and onboarding checklist steps as the operating control.

Category: Data Platform Readiness
Impact: SCIM enablement is complete and operational control is explicit: user management follows documented manual SSO/SCIM checklist execution with no additional automation/testing required at this stage.
Completed: 2026-03-09
Files Modified:
  • .github/workflows/workspace-configuration.yml
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/sso_configuration
Related Gap: Account SSO/SCIM Automation
ARCH-002

Implement Secrets Rotation Orchestration

HighPlanned

Automate service principal and database credential rotation with alerting (80-day SP refresh, 30-day DB passwords, long-lived admin) to ensure production data pipeline security and prevent auth failures during critical operations

Category: Data Platform Readiness
Impact: Improves post-launch security hardening by enforcing credential freshness via automated EventBridge trigger and expiry alerting; reduces risk of auth failures from credential age drift.
Files Modified:
  • pipeline_workflows/
  • aws_databricks_provisioning/modules/
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/workspace_monitoring/
Related Gap: Secret Rotation Automation
ARCH-003

Remove Broad Drift Guard on Audit Log Delivery

HighCompleted

Transition to import-first state onboarding and tighten ignore_changes scope for audit delivery resources to ensure production data platform audit trail integrity

Category: Operations
Impact: Improves drift detection fidelity for audit logging configuration. Removed broad ignore_changes = [policy] from KMS key and ignore_changes = [rule] from S3 lifecycle, enabling terraform plan to detect real configuration changes. Critical audit telemetry now protected.
Files Modified:
  • aws_databricks_provisioning/modules/storage/main.tf
Related Gap: Audit Drift Detection
ARCH-004

Define and Test DR Runbooks with RTO/RPO

CriticalCompleted

Create executable recovery playbooks with tiered RTO/RPO and recurring restore drills for production data platform

Category: Operations
Impact: Foundation for production reliability: IaC-first approach enables 1-hour RTO for prod, 4-hour for staging, 8-hour for dev. Data platform recovery is predictable and testable. Measurable recovery objectives make production readiness assessments credible.
Files Modified:
  • docs/DISASTER_RECOVERY_RUNBOOK.md
  • docs/INCIDENT_LOG.md
Related Gap: Disaster Recovery Readiness
ARCH-005

Enforce Budget and Cost Anomaly Controls

HighCompleted

Implemented comprehensive cost alerting and budget controls with SNS notifications, CloudWatch anomaly detection, and monthly cost analysis jobs. Hard budget thresholds with daily 5-minute monitoring, 2σ anomaly detection for production spend patterns, and weekly cost spike comparison alarms. Fully resolved production cost governance blocker.

Category: Data Platform Readiness
Impact: ✅ CRITICAL BLOCKER RESOLVED: Prevents 2-3x budget overruns with hard monthly budget thresholds ($5,000 default, configurable), daily cost anomaly detection (ANOMALY_DETECTION_BAND 2σ), weekly cost spike alerts (25% threshold), and monthly Databricks cost analysis job. SNS email notifications to ops/finance teams. CloudWatch dashboard for real-time cost visualization. Optional Lambda-based auto-remediation framework. Production data platform cost governance fully enforced and monitored.
Completed: 2026-03-05
Files Modified:
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/cost_alerting/main.tf
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/cost_alerting/variables.tf
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/cost_alerting/outputs.tf
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/workspace_configuration/main.tf
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/workspace_configuration/variables.tf
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/workspace_configuration/terraform.tfvars.example
  • aws_dbx/aws-databricks-backend-provisioning/terraform/iam_workspace_configuration.tf
  • docs/COST_ALERTING_IMPLEMENTATION.md
  • docs/COST_ALERTING_QUICK_REFERENCE.md
  • docs/WORKSPACE_CONFIGURATION_GAPS.md
Related Gap: Cost Governance Enforcement
ARCH-006

Expand Observability to Lineage and Data Quality SLOs

HighIn Progress

Implement Delta Live Tables expectations, data freshness SLO tracking, and quality scorecards for all critical tables. Without this, production data quality issues propagate undetected until users report bad reports.

Category: Data Platform Readiness
Impact: Post-launch reliability enhancement: Delta Live Tables expectations, freshness SLO dashboards, and lineage visibility improve proactive issue detection and BI trust. Infrastructure monitoring is complete; deeper data quality observability is being expanded.
Files Modified:
  • aws_databricks_provisioning/modules/monitoring_observability/
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/workspace_monitoring/
  • docs/DISASTER_RECOVERY_RUNBOOK.md
Related Gap: Observability Depth

DATA-001

Build Data Catalog and Metadata Framework

HighPlanned

Implement data dictionary, glossary, and lineage tracking for all tables in Unity Catalog

Category: Compliance
Impact: Enables self-service data discovery, reduces duplicate ETL, improves data quality compliance (L2.2 → L3.5)

  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/workspace_monitoring/
  • docs/data_catalog_setup.md
Related Gap: Data Catalog & Glossary
DATA-002

Implement Data Quality Framework with SLOs

CriticalPlanned

Deploy Delta Live Tables expectations, data quality rules, and SLO tracking for all critical tables. CRITICAL BLOCKER: Without this, bad data silently propagates to BI reports and breaks Week 3.

Category: Data Platform Readiness
Impact: CRITICAL FOR PRODUCTION LAUNCH: Prevents bad data propagation, enables data quality observability, enables first-week BI pipeline validation. Without DLT expectations and quality gates, Week 3 BI reports will show bad numbers and stakeholders lose trust.
Files Modified:
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/workspace_monitoring/
  • docs/data_quality_standards.md
Related Gap: Data Quality Governance
DATA-003

Implement Row & Column-Level Security (RLS/CLS)

HighPlanned

Deploy row-level filtering and column-level masking for sensitive data across Unity Catalog

Category: Security
Impact: Enables role-based data access, prevents unauthorized PII exposure, achieves GDPR/CCPA compliance
Files Modified:
  • databricks-workspace-configuration-aws/modules/dbx_users_groups/
  • docs/security_masking_standards.md
